1.name: College of Engineering, Guindy (CEG)
1.overview: CEG is one of India's oldest engineering institutions and a constituent college of Anna University. It is known for strong academics, research culture, and excellent placements.
highlights: Top Government Engineering College in Tamil Nadu

admissionProcess.title: TNEA Registration
admissionProcess.description: Apply via TNEA counseling portal and upload documents

admissionProcess.title: Rank List
admissionProcess.description: Check rank list and counseling schedule

admissionProcess.title: Choice Filling
admissionProcess.description: Select CEG and preferred branches during counseling

admissionProcess.title: Seat Allotment
admissionProcess.description: Seat allotment based on rank and preference

reviews.name: Karthik Kumar
reviews.comment: Great placements and amazing campus life.

reviews.name: Priya Nair
reviews.comment: Good labs and strong peer learning.
